name: jk-0001--mental-health-psychoeducation
description: Comprehensive psychoeducation on mental health conditions, therapy modalities, evidence-based coping techniques, psychiatric medications, and self-assessment frameworks. Educational resource only — not medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Use when learning about mental health concepts, understanding therapy options, exploring coping strategies, or recognizing when to seek professional help. Trigger on "mental health", "therapy types", "coping strategies", "anxiety", "depression", "ADHD", "psychiatric medication", "when should I see a therapist".
